title: Spicy Thai Dumplings
description: A recipe for Thai-style dumplings filled with a sweet and spicy filling, served with a side of tangy sauce.
instructions: 1. In a large mixing bowl, combine the gooey dough, prik paste, and nam pla (if using). Mix until a smooth dough forms.
2. Divide the dough into small balls, about the size of a small egg.
3. Flatten each ball of dough into a thin circle.
4. Place a small spoonful of the sweet filling in the center of each dough circle.
5. Fold the dough over the filling to form a half-moon shape, and press the edges together to seal the dumpling.
6. Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
7. Add the dumplings to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
8. Serve the dumplings hot with a side of sweet chili sauce for dipping.
9. Garnish with green onions and cilantro.
